links.title: 開啟網頁入口統計
links.tooltip: 切換到 nginx web ingress route 統計 dashboard

links.title: 開啟即時事件流
links.tooltip: 切換到 terminal-like DLP evidence stream

links.title: 開啟行為統計
links.tooltip: 切換到 DLP Webalizer-style insights dashboard

links.title: 開啟 NAS 主機監控
links.tooltip: 查看利善美 NAS CPU、記憶體、Disk 與 service/network-facing 狀態

panels.description: 最近 30 分鐘 File Station transfer DB adapter 送出的明確下載/匯出事件數。只統計已進 Loki 的 raw evidence，不推估缺漏。

targets.expr: sum(count_over_time({job="warroom-dlp-event-collector", nas_host="lishanmei", source_app="file_station", action=~"webapp_file_download|webapp_file_export"}[30m]))

panels.title: 最近 30m File Station download/export

panels.description: 最近 30 分鐘 File Station 下載/匯出事件中，payload 內 actor 欄位的 distinct count；空值不補猜。

targets.expr: count(sum by (actor) (count_over_time({job="warroom-dlp-event-collector", nas_host="lishanmei", source_app="file_station", action=~"webapp_file_download|webapp_file_export"} | json | actor != "" [30m])))

panels.title: 最近 30m unique actors

panels.description: 最近 30 分鐘 File Station 下載/匯出事件中，payload 內 source_ip 欄位的 distinct count；空值不補猜。

targets.expr: count(sum by (source_ip) (count_over_time({job="warroom-dlp-event-collector", nas_host="lishanmei", source_app="file_station", action=~"webapp_file_download|webapp_file_export"} | json | source_ip != "" [30m])))

panels.title: 最近 30m unique source IPs

panels.description: 依 source_app / network_protocol / service 呈現事件來源分布。這是服務/協定面向，不代表 SMB per-file audit 覆蓋率。

targets.expr: topk(20, sum by (category) (count_over_time({job="warroom-dlp-event-collector", nas_host="lishanmei"} | json | label_format category="{{.source_app}}/{{.network_protocol}}/{{.service}}" [$__range])))

panels.title: Protocol/service distribution

panels.description: X 軸為 actor/login user，Y 軸為目前時間範圍內 File Station download/export 事件量。用來快速看誰最常取出檔案。

targets.expr: topk(20, sum by (category) (count_over_time({job="warroom-dlp-event-collector", nas_host="lishanmei", source_app="file_station", action=~"webapp_file_download|webapp_file_export"} | json | actor != "" | label_format category="{{.actor}}" [$__range])))

panels.title: Login/File Station user activity volume

panels.description: X 軸為來源 IP，Y 軸為目前時間範圍內 download/export 事件量。用來辨識集中來源或外部來源。

targets.expr: topk(20, sum by (category) (count_over_time({job="warroom-dlp-event-collector", nas_host="lishanmei", source_app="file_station", action=~"webapp_file_download|webapp_file_export"} | json | source_ip != "" | label_format category="{{.source_ip}}" [$__range])))

panels.title: Source IP activity volume

panels.description: X 軸為檔案路徑，Y 軸為目前時間範圍內下載/匯出次數。長標籤會旋轉顯示，適合找出反覆外流檔案。

targets.expr: topk(20, sum by (category) (count_over_time({job="warroom-dlp-event-collector", nas_host="lishanmei", source_app="file_station", action=~"webapp_file_download|webapp_file_export"} | json | display_path != "" | label_format category="{{.display_path}}" [$__range])))

panels.title: Downloaded file volume by file path

panels.description: X 軸為 folder_path，Y 軸為目前時間範圍內 download/export 事件量。用來找出被集中取出的資料夾。

targets.expr: topk(20, sum by (category) (count_over_time({job="warroom-dlp-event-collector", nas_host="lishanmei", source_app="file_station", action=~"webapp_file_download|webapp_file_export"} | json | folder_path != "" | label_format category="{{.folder_path}}" [$__range])))

panels.title: Folder activity volume

panels.description: X 軸為 file_name，Y 軸為目前時間範圍內 download/export 事件量。用於比完整 path 更短的檔名視角。

targets.expr: topk(20, sum by (category) (count_over_time({job="warroom-dlp-event-collector", nas_host="lishanmei", source_app="file_station", action=~"webapp_file_download|webapp_file_export"} | json | file_name != "" | label_format category="{{.file_name}}" [$__range])))

panels.title: File name activity volume

panels.description: X 軸為 source_country，Y 軸為目前時間範圍內 download/export 事件量。只有 GeoIP enrichment 有資料時才會顯示。

targets.expr: topk(20, sum by (category) (count_over_time({job="warroom-dlp-event-collector", nas_host="lishanmei", source_app="file_station", action=~"webapp_file_download|webapp_file_export"} | json | source_country != "" | label_format category="{{.source_country}}" [$__range])))

panels.title: Country activity volume

panels.description: X 軸為 source_region，Y 軸為目前時間範圍內 download/export 事件量。只有 GeoIP enrichment 有資料時才會顯示。

targets.expr: topk(20, sum by (category) (count_over_time({job="warroom-dlp-event-collector", nas_host="lishanmei", source_app="file_station", action=~"webapp_file_download|webapp_file_export"} | json | source_region != "" | label_format category="{{.source_region}}" [$__range])))

panels.title: Region activity volume

panels.description: 依 size_bytes 分成級距統計下載/匯出頻率；這是檔案外流量級的摘要，不顯示流水帳。

targets.expr: sum(count_over_time({job="warroom-dlp-event-collector", nas_host="lishanmei", source_app="file_station", action=~"webapp_file_download|webapp_file_export"} | json | size_bytes < 10485760 [$__range]))

sum(count_over_time({job="warroom-dlp-event-collector", nas_host="lishanmei", source_app="file_station", action=~"webapp_file_download|webapp_file_export"} | json | size_bytes >= 10485760 | size_bytes < 104857600 [$__range]))

sum(count_over_time({job="warroom-dlp-event-collector", nas_host="lishanmei", source_app="file_station", action=~"webapp_file_download|webapp_file_export"} | json | size_bytes >= 104857600 | size_bytes < 1073741824 [$__range]))

sum(count_over_time({job="warroom-dlp-event-collector", nas_host="lishanmei", source_app="file_station", action=~"webapp_file_download|webapp_file_export"} | json | size_bytes >= 1073741824 [$__range]))

panels.title: File size frequency histogram

panels.description: 依 source_channel/gap_stage 統計最近 24 小時 historical capability gap；請搭配 active gap panels 判斷是否仍在發生。

targets.expr: topk(20, sum by (category) (count_over_time({job="warroom-dlp-event-collector", nas_host="lishanmei", action="capability_gap", source_channel="collector_capability_gap"} | json | label_format category="{{.source_key}}/{{.affected_capability}}/{{.gap_stage}}" [24h])))

panels.title: Historical capability gap frequency (24h)

panels.description: 最近 2 分鐘 collector registry 仍在發生的 capability gap。使用短視窗避免重啟前 transition gap 污染 active 狀態；historical gap 請看 24h histogram。

targets.expr: sum(count_over_time({job="warroom-dlp-event-collector", nas_host="lishanmei", action="capability_gap", source_channel="collector_capability_gap"}[2m])) or vector(0)

panels.title: Active capability gaps (2m)

panels.description: 最近 1 小時登入失敗數，來源為 structured auth_log。用於暴力破解與異常登入 readiness。

targets.expr: sum(count_over_time({job="warroom-dlp-event-collector", nas_host="lishanmei", source_channel="auth_log", action="auth_failure"}[1h])) or vector(0)

panels.title: Auth failures (1h)

panels.description: 最近 15 分鐘 network_socket snapshot 觀察到的 established TCP 連線數，用於連線突增 readiness。

targets.expr: max_over_time({job="warroom-dlp-event-collector", nas_host="lishanmei", source_channel="network_socket"} | json | unwrap tcp_established_count [15m]) or vector(0)

panels.title: TCP established max (15m)

panels.description: 最近 1 小時大檔案下載事件數，依 File Station `size_bytes` 判斷。

targets.expr: sum(count_over_time({job="warroom-dlp-event-collector", nas_host="lishanmei", action="webapp_file_download"} | json | size_bytes >= 104857600 [1h])) or vector(0)

panels.title: Large downloads >100MB (1h)

panels.description: 依 service/action 統計 NAS 系統/服務 log 頻率；這是服務事件摘要，不是 per-file audit。

targets.expr: topk(30, sum by (category) (count_over_time({job="warroom-dlp-event-collector", nas_host="lishanmei", source_channel="nas_system_log"} | json | label_format category="{{.service}}/{{.action}}" [$__range])))

panels.title: NAS system/service log frequency histogram

title: 利善美智能 / DLP 檔案證據總覽
